title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 8.825 - Department to provide energy efficiency practices information to persons in construction or maintenance of state buildings
text:
8.825.  Department to provide energy efficiency practices information to persons in construction or maintenance of state buildings. — The department shall make available energy efficiency practices information to be used by individuals involved in the design, construction, retrofitting and maintenance of public buildings and state buildings.
(L. 1993 H.B. 195 § 7)
